---
title: "Modular OER Method"
format: html

previous:
  href: "../index.html"
  text: "Home"

next:
  href: "Modular-Why Quarto.html"
  text: "Why Use Quarto for OERs?"
---

### Learning outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   Create Quarto documents that integrate narrative, code, and data.

-   Understand the principles of using RStudio’s Visual and Source editors effectively.

-   Implement computational reproducibility in OERs.

-   Create indexed lists for terminology and hyperlinks to support localisation.

-   Publish modular, remixable OERs online.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Modular-Why%20Quarto.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Why%20Quarto.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
